blocks.title: Context & needs
paragraphs: Aurora Logistics operates 24 distribution sites across Italy and the DACH region. Plant managers currently rely on end-of-week spreadsheets to catch downtime, so costly stoppages often stay invisible until the monthly close.
The operations team asked for a way to see cost-of-downtime in real time and route alerts to the right shift lead, without adding new hardware to the line.

blocks.title: Proposed solution
paragraphs: Kite Analytics deploys plug-and-play adapters against Aurora's existing PLCs and MES, live within two weeks per site.
bullets: Live cost-of-downtime dashboard for every plant manager
Alerts routed automatically to the on-duty shift lead
Monthly variance report delivered straight to the COO's inbox

entries.label: Weeks 1-2
entries.heading: Pilot
points: Install adapters and validate the data feed
Train shift leads on the live dashboard

entries.label: Weeks 3-8
entries.heading: Scale-up
points: Roll out in batches of 5 sites per week
Weekly check-in with the Aurora ops team

blocks.title: Investment
blocks.note: Pricing valid for 60 days from the proposal date; annual billing saves 15%.
